root_cause_analysis.symptom: test_AC3 has 3 assertions but does not assert files_created_provenance_violation. Running pytest would pass even if that label were removed from qa.md.
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: When test_AC3 was written for cycle 20260522-080646-D, the files_created sub-check (M4b) was added to qa.md but the corresponding assertion was not added to the test. The test_writer covered the M4a (files_modified) label but not M4b (files_created) label.
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_commit: N/A -- test coverage gap introduced during cycle 20260522-080646-D initial test-writer run
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: Test-writer targeted dev_provenance_violation (M4a) but missed files_created_provenance_violation (M4b).
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: A future removal of the files_created_provenance_violation label from qa.md would pass test_AC3 undetected.
root_cause_analysis.timeline: Gap existed since test_AC3 was first generated in cycle 20260522-080646-D. Survived iter1, iter2, iter3 reviews as a minor observation (not a blocker in iter3).
observations: test_AC3_2059b2b3bcc430f6.py read directly (31 lines): assertions at lines 25 (dev_provenance_violation), 27 (baseline_head_sha), 29 (primary_cause.*dev_implementation) -- no files_created_provenance_violation present (observed: direct file read)
test_AC4_7c792480bc275ff9.py read directly (82 lines): lines 58-70 contain per-line loop with is_negation_explanation boolean -- NOT re.search(...) is None (observed: direct file read)
ba-qa-report-20260522-080646-D-iter3.json read directly: status=pass, blockers=[], minor_note N2 confirms test_AC4 semantic approach is correct and non-blocking (observed: direct file read)
root_cause_analysis.diagnosis_completeness: complete (all three key files read directly in this session)
root_cause_analysis.localization_evidence: Direct read of test_AC3_2059b2b3bcc430f6.py (31 lines) confirmed the assertion is absent. Direct read of test_AC4_7c792480bc275ff9.py (82 lines) confirmed the negative assertion IS present using is_negation_explanation. Direct read of ba-qa-report-20260522-080646-D-iter3.json confirmed status=pass with test_AC4 already resolved.
